chapter_title.ar: باب الشِّوَاءِ وَ الْكَبَابِ وَ الرُّءُوسِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 68 – The Grill, and the Kebab, and the heads (of the sheep)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/144)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/144)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad Al Shamy, from Husayn Bin hanzala,
(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘Eat the Kabab (roast), it does away with (removes) the fever’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad al- Shamiy from al-Husayn ibn Hanzalah who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, (abu Ja‘far or abu ‘Abd Allah), ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, eating kabab dispels fever.’”
